narratives.narrative: Threat actor CDB-APT-22 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1059, T1203, T1204.001, T1555, T1195. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

jwt_tokens.note: Symmetric crypto — quantum resistant (Grover halves keyspace)
